posts.title: Post Management
posts.slug_hint: Custom URL path for the post
posts.tags_hint: Enter tag name and press Enter
posts.clear_tags_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to remove all tags from the current post? This action does not auto-save.

setup_reminder.title: One last setup reminder before writing
setup_reminder.description: If AI, notifications, or storage policies are not fully configured yet, you can review the settings first or dismiss this and start writing immediately.

posts.pinned_hint: Up to 3 posts can be pinned. Public lists prioritize all pinned posts, while the homepage latest section keeps only the most recent pinned post and fills the remaining slots with recent posts.
posts.publish_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to publish this post? It will be visible to visitors immediately after publication.
posts.push_criteria_hint: System will automatically match subscribers based on categories and tags of this post.

push_options.none_desc: Publish the post only, no notification to subscribers.
push_options.draft_desc: Automatically create a marketing campaign draft for later editing and sending.
push_options.now_desc: Immediately send an email notification to relevant subscribers after publication.

posts.sync_to_memos_desc: Automatically create a summary memo in your Memos instance after publication.
posts.translation_group_hint: Link different language versions of the same post to enable switcher on front end
posts.save_current_first: Please save the current post first before creating a translation
posts.repush_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to push this article to subscribers again? This will generate a new email notification.

distribution.first_sync_hint: The first delivery will create a new remote entry.
distribution.wechatsync_ready: WechatSync extension detected. Select accounts to start delivery.
distribution.extension_missing: WechatSync extension was not detected. Install it and sign in first.

tts.manuscript_hint: You can fine-tune the script, or click AI Polish to generate a more engaging broadcast-style script.
tts.podcast_manuscript_notice: In dual podcast mode, the Doubao podcast model may rewrite the script during synthesis, so final audio may not exactly match the manuscript.

ai.voice_unsupported: Voice recognition is not supported in this browser. Please try Chrome or Edge.
ai.article_illustration_hint: Article illustrations are inserted into the markdown only after confirmation and then recorded in visual asset metadata.
ai.visual_asset_inserted: The visual asset was inserted into the article and recorded in metadata.

cover_generator.title: AI Image Generator
cover_generator.usage_hint: Covers, inline illustrations, topic heroes, and event posters now share the same five-dimension prompt model.
cover_generator.magic_hint: Generate structured five-dimension suggestions from the article context
cover_generator.confirm_candidate_notice: The editor currently generates candidates only. Nothing is applied until you confirm the selected asset.
cover_generator.success: Visual asset generated and saved to the media library
cover_generator.error: Failed to generate image, please try again

placeholders.palette: Primary colors, accent colors, and contrast
placeholders.text: Headline treatment, hierarchy, and safe area

translation_workflow.title: Full Translation Workflow
translation_workflow.intro: Choose the source post, target language, and fields to overwrite. The editor will switch between streaming refill and chunked refill by text length while preserving already written boundaries.
translation_workflow.no_sources: No translation source is available yet. Save the source post first or load another version from the same translation cluster.
translation_workflow.scope_hint: Categories and tags will first try to map to entities in the same translation cluster, while cover images and podcast audio are synced directly from the source post.
translation_workflow.same_language_warning: Source and target languages must be different. Please choose another target.

action_descriptions.create: A new translation version will be created for the target language and only the selected fields will be written.
action_descriptions.continue: Translation will continue from the current draft and refresh the selected fields with new output.
action_descriptions.overwrite: The selected fields of the published target version will be replaced with fresh translation output.

translation_workflow.switch_target_hint: The current editor is not the target language version. Starting will switch to the matching target editor and keep your source and scope choices.
translation_workflow.applied_content_empty: No translated content has been applied yet
translation_workflow.stream_fallback: Streaming refill failed, switched to chunked refill automatically.
translation_workflow.task_fallback: This deployment does not support long-text streaming translation. Switched to task polling automatically.
translation_workflow.continue_draft: The target draft already contains content. Continuing will refresh the selected fields with new translation output.
translation_workflow.overwrite_draft: The target version already contains content. Continuing will overwrite the selected fields with new translation output.
translation_workflow.overwrite_published_first: The target version is already published. Continuing will overwrite the selected fields in the live version.
translation_workflow.overwrite_published_second: Second confirmation: continuing now will replace the selected fields of the published version.

posts.content_too_short: Article content too short for analysis

wechatsync.extension_help: Please install and enable the WechatSync browser extension to use this feature.
wechatsync.no_accounts: No accounts found. Please make sure you are logged in to the extension.

posts.recover_draft_confirm: Unsaved local draft detected. Would you like to recover it?
posts.version_rollback_confirm: Are you sure you want to rollback to this version? Current editor content will be overwritten.
posts.version_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this version?
posts.version_diff_empty: No field changes were found for the current comparison.
posts.version_restore_success: The selected version has been restored and a new linear version record was created.
posts.version_restore_noop: The selected version already matches the latest state, so no duplicate version was created.
posts.version_restore_failed: Failed to restore the selected version.

users.confirm_impersonate: Are you sure you want to impersonate "{name}"? This will open a new session.

theme.title: Theme Customization
theme.custom_hint: In Custom mode, your manual color and style adjustments will be preserved and saved.
theme.color_reset_hint: Leave empty to use theme preset defaults
theme.mourning_mode_hint: Greyscale the whole site for special memorial days
theme.previewing_hint: Temporary preview mode active. Click cancel to revert.
theme.save_preset_hint: This will capture all current colors, border radius, and background settings.
theme.gallery_empty: Gallery is empty. Save your first custom preset!

commercial.global_toggle_desc: Enable or disable global monetization/sponsorship. When enabled, sponsor buttons will be displayed based on author or site-wide settings.
commercial.global_social_desc: Configure global default social links (used when author hasn't set their own).
commercial.global_donation_desc: Configure global default donation links (used when author hasn't set their own).

system.title: System Settings
system.locked_by_env: This config is currently forced by environment variables and cannot be modified manually.

smart_mode.title: Smart Hybrid Mode
smart_mode.description: System settings resolve through ENV, database, and fallback defaults. The top summary stays compact, while each field explains its active source inline.

messages.env_override: The current value is controlled by environment variable {envKey}, so saving here will not take effect immediately.
messages.forced_env_lock: This setting is read during startup and must be changed through environment variables followed by a restart.
messages.default_used: This field is currently using the fallback default because it has not been explicitly configured.
messages.restart_required: The database value is saved, but a service restart is required before it is fully applied.
messages.db_active: The current value comes from the database configuration.

demo_preview.title: Demo Preview Data
demo_preview.description: This page is showing sanitized sample data so the system settings experience remains demonstrable in Demo mode. Reads are redirected to safe preview content, while save and delete operations are still blocked.

floating_actions.leave_confirm: You still have unsaved changes on this page. Leave anyway?

setup_follow_up.title: Recommended admin checklist
setup_follow_up.description: The installation wizard only covered the minimum bootstrap path. On your first admin visit, finish auth, notification, AI, and storage strategy before continuing into the editor flow.

auth.title: Auth
auth.description: Confirm registration policy, captcha, and the first admin recovery path.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Wire browser push and admin alerts so important site events are never silent.

ai.title: AI services
ai.description: Review models, quotas, and cost display before authors start using the tools.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Verify upload paths, object storage, and disk thresholds before production use.

audit_logs.title: Configuration Audit Logs
audit_logs.description: Tracks administrator writes to database-backed settings and shows whether the database value is still the active source.

notifications.title: Admin Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Configure how admins receive alerts for specific site events. Timely notifications help you respond quickly to user interactions and system issues.

web_push.title: Web Push Base Configuration
web_push.description: Browser alerts for admin events rely on the VAPID subject, public key, and a private key that stays in server-side environment variables only. Maintain the public subject/key here and inspect whether the private key is ready in the runtime environment.
web_push.subject_hint: Use a contact URI that starts with mailto:, for example mailto:admin{'@'}example.com.
web_push.public_key_hint: Provide the VAPID public key used by browsers when subscribing.
web_push.private_key_hint: The VAPID private key can only be injected through the WEB_PUSH_VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY environment variable. Use pnpm web-push:generate-vapid to generate a full key set.

delivery_logs.title: Notification Delivery Audit
delivery_logs.description: Track notification delivery by type, channel, result, and time range so delivery remains observable end to end.

keys.friend_links_footer_enabled: Show Featured Friend Links in Footer
keys.live2d_data_saver_block: Disable Live2D on Data Saver / Slow Network
keys.canvas_nest_data_saver_block: Disable CanvasNest on Data Saver / Slow Network
keys.effects_data_saver_block: Disable Visual Effects on Data Saver / Slow Network
keys.ai_quota_description: Configure request, quota unit, cost, and heavy-task concurrency limits by global, role, and user layers.
keys.ai_image_description: Configure models for generating blog covers and illustrations
keys.ai_tts_description: Configure Cloud TTS services for blog content, podcasts, etc.

localized.helper: Edit each locale separately. Public pages resolve through one shared fallback chain.
localized.ai_generate_success: Draft generated for the current locale
localized.legacy_title: This field is still using the legacy single-value format
localized.legacy_description: This setting previously stored one site-wide value only. The first locale-aware save will migrate it to structured multilingual storage, while the old value remains as a compatibility fallback.
localized.env_override_legacy_title: This field is locked by an environment override and still uses the legacy single-value format
localized.env_override_legacy_description: {envKey} currently provides a plain string value, so every locale will share the same effective content. To enable real multilingual behavior, remove the environment override and manage it in admin settings, or rewrite it as structured localized JSON.
localized.env_override_structured_title: This field is locked by an environment override
localized.env_override_structured_description: {envKey} currently provides structured localized JSON. The admin editor is read-only in this state; update that environment variable directly to change locale-specific values.
localized.missing_translation: {locale} is currently empty. The runtime will fall back through {fallbackChain}, and only then try the legacy single-value fallback.
localized.text_hint: Leaving the current locale empty does not copy another locale. The final text is resolved by the shared fallback chain.
localized.string_list_hint: Separate keywords with commas. They will be saved as a structured list for the current locale.
localized.keywords_description: Maintain SEO keywords per locale. The public API still returns a comma-separated string, while storage uses a list structure.

hints.site_name: Used as the fallback name for SEO, emails, and similar contexts when the site title is empty.
hints.post_copyright: Used only as the default copyright license for post pages and external distribution. It does not drive the site copyright line.
hints.site_copyright_owner: Used by the site copyright line. Falls back to the site operator, then the site title when empty.
hints.site_copyright_start_year: Leave empty to show only the current year. Provide a four-digit year to render a year range when applicable.
hints.feedback_url: Used by the public feedback page as the “contact this deployment” entry. You can provide a ticket URL, a form URL, or a mailto link. When empty, the contact email is used as the fallback.
hints.ai_quota_policies_description: Use the basic editor for global and role rules first. Add user, trust_level, and type:* exceptions in the advanced JSON section when needed.
hints.ai_alert_thresholds_description: Configure quota usage, cost usage, and short-window failure burst alert thresholds with a form-based editor.
hints.ai_cost_factors_description: Use quota-unit price and exchange rates to unify AI cost display. The current rule uses the higher one between quota mapping and converted provider price.
hints.keywords_placeholder: One keyword per line. Matching comments will be marked as pending or spam.
hints.posts_per_page: Used as the default limit for post lists, archives, and similar paginated endpoints when no explicit limit is provided.
hints.upload_size_value: Supports unit-based values such as 4.5MiB or 100MB.
hints.audio_upload_size_value: Use a larger dedicated limit for audio files when needed. Unit-based values such as 100MiB or 256MB are supported.
hints.upload_daily_limit: Maximum number of uploads allowed globally within the rate-limit window.
hints.upload_single_user_daily_limit: Maximum number of uploads each user can make within the rate-limit window.
hints.upload_limit_window: Time window used for upload rate limiting, in seconds.
hints.email_daily_limit: Maximum number of emails the whole site can send within the rate-limit window.
hints.email_single_user_daily_limit: Maximum number of emails a single address can receive within the rate-limit window.
hints.email_limit_window: Time window used for email rate limiting, in seconds.
hints.footer_code: Injected at the end of the site footer. HTML snippets are supported.
hints.friend_links_application_guidelines: Shown at the top of the public friend link application page. Supports multi-line text for entry requirements and exchange rules.
hints.friend_links_footer_limit: Controls how many featured friend links can appear in the footer section.
hints.friend_links_check_interval_minutes: Minimum interval for friend link availability checks, in minutes.
hints.travellings_header_enabled: Controls whether the Travelling entry appears in the desktop header and mobile navigation drawer.
hints.travellings_footer_enabled: Controls whether the Travelling entry appears in the global footer navigation.
hints.travellings_sidebar_enabled: Controls whether the Travelling entry appears in the post detail sidebar.
hints.local_storage_min_free_space: Uploads will be rejected when local disk free space drops below this threshold. Value is in bytes.
hints.memos_access_token: Generate in Memos Settings -> Account -> Access Tokens
hints.listmonk_username: Enter the listmonk admin username, for example admin
hints.listmonk_access_token: API Access Token generated in the listmonk admin console
hints.listmonk_default_list_ids: e.g., 1,2,5. Used when category/tag mappings do not match
hints.listmonk_template_id: Optional listmonk template ID. Leave empty to use the generated campaign body

ai_editor.basic_quota_description: Manage the most common global and role-based quota rules here for day-to-day operations.
ai_editor.basic_quota_empty: No basic policy yet. Start with a global daily quota rule.
ai_editor.basic_policy_help: Any limit left empty will be treated as unlimited.
ai_editor.advanced_json_description: Edit this only for special rules such as user, trust_level, or type:* scopes. The content must be a policy array.
ai_editor.alerts_description: The first release supports quota usage, cost usage, and failure burst alerts to close the minimum viable governance loop.
ai_editor.failure_burst_description: Trigger when failures spike within a short window to spot provider, model, or pipeline issues.
ai_editor.cost_mapping_description: Map quota units to the unified admin-facing currency while still converting provider-native pricing when available.
ai_editor.cost_mapping_hint: Displayed cost defaults to quota units × unit price. If the converted provider price is higher, the higher value is used to avoid underestimation.
ai_editor.invalid_quota_json: The current quota policy JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw editing mode so you can repair it first.
ai_editor.invalid_advanced_json: Advanced JSON must be a valid policy array before saving.
ai_editor.invalid_alert_json: The current alert threshold JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw editing mode so you can repair it first.
ai_editor.invalid_cost_json: The current cost mapping JSON cannot be parsed. Switched to raw editing mode so you can repair it first.

agreements.title: Agreements Management
agreements.description: Manage user agreements and privacy policies with authoritative, active, and reference-translation governance.
agreements.aggregated_view_help: Grouped view merges records by authoritative version and prefers the translation for the current interface language.
agreements.flat_view_help: Full list expands every language/version record so you can edit, switch, and inspect them individually.
agreements.activate_requires_approval: Only approved authoritative versions can be activated
agreements.language_help: Versions in the authoritative language can be activated directly. Other languages are published as reference translations.
agreements.source_version_placeholder: Select the authoritative version this translation follows
agreements.source_version_help: Reference translations are displayed together with the authoritative version selected here.
agreements.authoritative_help: This language matches the authoritative language. Save it first, then activate it from the list when needed.
agreements.ai_draft_success: AI draft created. Continue with manual review before activation.
agreements.approve_success: Marked as approved and ready for activation
agreements.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agreement version? This action cannot be undone.

restrictions.env_locked: Agreements injected from environment variables cannot be edited or deleted
restrictions.consented: Versions already consented to by users cannot be edited or deleted
restrictions.active_authoritative: The currently active authoritative version cannot be edited or deleted. Create and activate a new version instead

subscribers.title: Subscribers
subscribers.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this subscriber?

notifications.title: Notification Management
notifications.description: Review in-app, SSE, web push, and email delivery outcomes in one place so you can confirm which notifications were delivered, failed, or skipped.

snippets.title: Inspiration Inbox
snippets.quick_capture_placeholder: Type your inspiration here, support multiple lines...
snippets.empty: No inspirations yet, start capturing your ideas!
snippets.empty_hint: Small notes here can lead to great works
snippets.aggregate_hint: Select multiple snippets for AI to generate a post scaffold
snippets.aggregate_hint_detailed: AI will analyze the {count} selected snippets, find logical connections, and build an outline for a deep article.
snippets.topic_placeholder: Enter the topic you want to write about (e.g., How to improve writing efficiency with AI)
snippets.expand_title: Add more details to this section
snippets.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this inspiration?
snippets.attachments_desc: Upload images to supplement your inspiration
snippets.bookmarklet_desc: Drag the button below to your bookmarks bar to capture inspirations while browsing any webpage.

comments.title: Comments
comments.author: Author
comments.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this comment?
